title: Record earlier micro-compaction and tighter tool-result budget contract
prompt: Create reports/micro-tool-budget-density.md with sections for Micro trigger, Recent window, Tool-result budget, and Evidence path.

fixtureActions.content:
# Micro Tool Budget Density Contract

## Micro trigger
micro-compaction usage pressure defaults to 50% so bulky tool results clear earlier in long sessions

## Recent window
keepRecentMessages default is 12 so older tool results clear sooner while recent work stays intact

## Tool-result budget
live tool outputs persist and preview earlier at 40k/1.5k chars to protect context headroom

## Evidence path
LioraBench holdout + micro/tool budget vitest + /status micro-clear badge
